name: Flickerfield Operative
flavor_text: "The first level is mapped. The second level is mapped differently every time."
art_prompt: A lean, nimble human rogue in dark blue leather armor crouches mid-stride through a shimmering, fractured corridor. Crystalline blue light refracts around them as they move, their hand outstretched toward swirling motes of arcane energy. Sharp features, focused expression, ready for swift action.. Stylized digital illustration, geometric composition, cool steel-blue and teal palette, screen-glow lighting, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
design_notes: Clean blue 1-drop uncommon. A 1/1 for U with scry 2 on ETB is a solid but not overpowered value creature — comparable to Opt stapled to a 1/1 body without the card draw. Scry 2 is meaningful card selection that supports blue's identity without breaking common power budgets. Good enabler for artifact-matters strategies since it helps find key pieces. Simple enough for uncommon but slightly above common power level due to the scry 2 value.
